step: Step 1: Fix Node Click Starting Point
goal: Node click starts a non-blocking tutor session instead of using /teach-node as the main path.
expectedFlow: backend enqueues BullMQ job named teach_node
backend returns sessionId, jobId, streamUrl, and statusUrl
frontend opens SSE stream and polls status
frontend renders first streamed segment when segment_ready arrives
frontend does not call /teach-node if the session path fails

lastVerification.note: Ran unsandboxed because sandbox blocks Watchman/local Supertest listen.

proves: worker runs source context and pipeline boundary
segment 0 payload is saved with board screens, commands, voice, subtitles, and audioUrl
full lesson is reloaded after save before lesson_ready
empty persisted lesson throws so BullMQ will fail instead of completing empty
